text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I should hope so.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I strive to remain calm and attentive... Yet I can
feel the adrenaline building.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen is right in front of me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The voting results came in the other day, securing
Grass Wonder's chance to run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Of course, Maruzensky is on the list of
participants as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass's long-awaited battle with the Beast is
finally here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At least, that's what we thought.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky is withdrawing from the Arima Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Yes... It seems she hurt herself during training.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
And that's not all—it looks like she was planning
for the Arima Kinen to be her final send-off
before moving on to the Dream Trophy League.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So you're saying... I won't have a chance to face
her in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: It looks to be that way.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
And what a shame it is too! I was so excited to see
the Beast and her Successor go head to head.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: I was all set to write the article for the ages covering it. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We had planned to discuss our strategy to beat
Maruzensky today, but...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: So my goal... is forever out of reach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's words come out as a
barely-audible whisper... I've never heard her
sound so broken.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The chance to overcome the Beast... To break
away from her looming shadow...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That chance... will never come again.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh well.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: We haven't the time to sulk, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The starting gates will open regardless of who's in
them. We must be prepared for the Arima Kinen,
yes?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: So I think...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I think I need to go for a run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Grass Wonder doesn't even look back as she
takes off at full speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder is tough—too tough to let herself
cry where I can see her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She needs her time alone. I understand that, but
still...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then, suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. Is Grass here, by any chance?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh... Looks like it's just you right now, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What's kicking? ...is what I'd usually say, but I
guess this is no time for pleasantries.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry about the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I know how hard you and Grass have been
working to get ready for it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm deeply sorry I won't be able to run. ...That's all
I've come to say.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her injury was an accident, I'm sure. She isn't to
blame.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But when I consider how much this meant to Grass
Wonder... I can't help but feel horribly let down.
choice_data_list:
Is there any chance you'll stay in the Twinkle
Series?

Is there any chance you'll stay in the Twinkle
Series?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Unfortunately, I'm afraid not.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I made up my mind to go to the Dream Trophy
Series a long time ago.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Besides...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The only reason you want me to stay is for Grass,
right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You want the two of us to race, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But if you ask me... now isn't the right time.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Grass and I shouldn't go head to head just yet.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: When I saw the Japan Cup, I just knew.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: That's my little secret.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But, hey. Grass will be fine. Just peachy.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: After all...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
There's one important thing she's always had tons
and tons of. Something I never had, no matter
how I longed for it!
